revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Classification_bar here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Classification_bar for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{| class="wikitable" style="margin:1em auto; font-size:95%;"
| style="padding:.5em;" | '''[[Wikipedia:Classification|Classification]]:''' {{#if:{{{1|}}}
| [[:Category:{{{1}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}
| : [[:Category:{{{2}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{2}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}
| : [[:Category:{{{3}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{3}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
| : [[:Category:{{{4}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{4}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}
| : [[:Category:{{{5}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{5}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}
| : [[:Category:{{{6}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{6}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}
| : [[:Category:{{{7}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{7}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}
| : [[:Category:{{{8}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{8}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}
| : [[:Category:{{{9}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{9}}}}}]]}}
|}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
